channel.title: Updates & Blog | Mike De Zilva
channel.description: Latest updates, articles, and thoughts from Mike De Zilva on Web3, Digital Infrastructure, and Music Technology.

item.title: Behind the Music: A New EP with Shane Vincent — Two Decades in the Making
item.description: The story of Mike De Zilva and Shane Vincent's new untitled EP, and why capturing an artist's 20-year creative evolution matters.

item.title: Finding the Human Element in an AI-Driven Creative World
item.description: How independent creators can use AI as a force multiplier without losing their unique voice, and the ultimate limitation of artificial intelligence.

item.title: Why I Refuse to Choose Between Code and Sound: The Hybrid Creative Identity
item.description: Mike De Zilva on rejecting the pressure to pick a single creative or technical path, and why coding and music production share the same modular mindset.

item.title: The Studio Setup: Building IP Across Code and Sound
item.description: An inside look at Mike De Zilva's home and Colombo studios, detailing a setup focused on utility and the philosophy of building IP across music and code.

item.title: The Story Behind "Near Love": The Feeling Between What Was and What Could Have Been
item.description: Discover the story behind "Near Love" by Mike De Zilva and Shane Vincent — a song about almost finding love, memories, timing, and the connections that stay with us.
